description:
The best all-in-one screen recorder and video editor. Record your screen, add video effects, transitions and more.

Camtasia is a video-based screen capture program that enables users to demonstrate and communicate ideas or share knowledge using video. From quick video demos to extensive video projects, Camtasia has a wide range of editing tools to create video content from a variety of sources. Users can record from webcam or screen, introduce a variety of effects, and easily share videos over multiple channels.
New Features
- Added the Edit Image in Snagit feature.
- Allow importing SNAGX files as images.
Feature Updates
- Add ability to double click the FPS button and open the project settings menu.
- Background tab in the Rev window is updated with new files.
- Added user configurable keyboard shortcut for Add Audio Point.
Updates for IT Administrators
- swfobject.js was unused and has been removed from the install.
Bug Fixes
- Fixed a bug where video streams in MTS files could fail to decode.
- Fixed a bug with the FPS button so it no longer opens up the playhead time control. Fixed a bug with tooltips that prevented shortcut commands from displaying correctly.
- Fix a bug where MP4 files recorded on Google Pixel 7 Pro could fail to decode video.
- Fixed a crash when ripple replacing the placeholder with legacy noise reduction effect.
- Fixed a bug that could cause some ADPCM audio streams to be ignored.
- Fixed a bug where a group's audio waveforms would not update after a trim and undo.
- Fixed an issue where the media Duration popup could leave a 1 frame gap between media.
- Fixed a bug where the installer could hang when running it quietly when the app is already installed.
- Fixed a bug where the installer could hang on exit after running it when another installation was already in progress.
- Fixed a user-reported licensing error.
